Image Cropper Engine — reference consumer

← demos  ·  Headless engine: ../image-cropper-engine.js + ../image-cropper-engine-export.js. Drag to pan · wheel / pinch to zoom · the crop stays covered. Every pixel below is consumer-rendered from emitted state.

Image

Zoom

Shape

Aspect ratio

Orientation

Output

Exported output (the real deliverable)

Frame the image, then press “Export crop”. The engine emits the source-pixel rect + orientation; the export helper bakes it to these pixels.
